request.system:
你是一个用于 PDF 原位回填的精修助手。
你处理的是已经翻译过、但版面过紧的文本块。
你的目标不是重写内容，而是在尽量不损失信息和正式风格的前提下，做最小必要压缩。
只返回 JSON，不要输出任何解释。

文档场景：上市公司年度报告翻译与逐页版面回填
目标风格：正式、审慎、可披露、接近已发布英文年报

动态文档背景：
- 章节线索：我們的目標 | 目錄 | 友邦保險一覽 | 2020 年里程碑 | 概覽 | 2020年業績一覽(1) | 2020年按市場分部劃分 | 主席報告 | 集團首席執行官兼總裁報告 | 財務及營運回顧
- 导航线索：概覽 | 財務及營運回顧 | 企業管治 | 其他資料 | 財務報表
- 高频术语：友邦保險 -> AIA | 新業務價值 -> new business value | 稅後營運溢利 -> operating profit after tax | 內涵價值 -> embedded value | 有效保單組合 -> in-force portfolio | 代理渠道 -> agency channel | 夥伴分銷 -> partnership distribution | 銀行保險 -> bancassurance | 中國內地 -> Mainland China | 中國台灣 -> Taiwan | 新加坡 -> Singapore | 泰國 -> Thailand
- 这是上市公司年度报告语境，译文要保持年报/财报正式书面表达，不使用口语化或营销化措辞。
- 文档包含财务表格、比率和金额，数字、百分比、币种、年份及缩写必须严格保留。
- 文档包含目录或侧边导航，导航项宜使用固定、稳定、可复用的正式译法。
- 文档存在大量章节标题，标题应优先贴近正式已发布年报的写法，并尽量避免不必要换行。

受保护信息：
- 数字
- 百分比
- 货币
- 年份
- 日期
- 专有名词
- 公司名
- 人名
- 地名
- 图表微标签
- 页码

硬约束：
- 只做最小幅度缩短，不要摘要化，不要改成分析师速记风格。
- 不要随意缩写正式标题、栏目名、导航项、图表标签、页眉页脚。
- 如果原文是完整句，优先保持完整句。
- block_id 必须原样保留。
- 返回格式：{"translations": [{"block_id": "...", "translation": "..."}]}

messages.content:
以下文本块版面过紧。请在不改变核心含义和正式风格的前提下，仅做最小必要压缩。
不要摘要，不要解释，只输出严格 JSON。
{
  "page_no": 5,
  "source_language": "Traditional Chinese",
  "target_language": "English",
  "problem_blocks": [
    {
      "block_id": "p5_b2",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "於2020年，2019冠狀病毒病為我們的社區帶來前所未見的",
      "current_translation": "During 2020, the COVID-19 pandemic presented unprecedented challenges to our communities.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.558,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 29,
      "bbox": [
        261.73,
        366.03,
        514.85,
        379.07
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 10.0,
      "suggested_font": "Helvetica-Bold"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p5_b3",
      "block_type": "label",
      "source_text": "風險。我們作出迅速和全面的應對，包括為我們的社區",
      "current_translation": "We responded swiftly and comprehensively, including providing medical supplies to our communities",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.522,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 24,
      "bbox": [
        261.73,
        384.03,
        514.98,
        397.07
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 10.0,
      "suggested_font": "Helvetica-Bold"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p5_b4",
      "block_type": "label",
      "source_text": "提供醫療物資，並為前線醫護和清潔人員提供免費保險",
      "current_translation": "and offering free insurance protection to frontline healthcare workers and sanitation personnel",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.562,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 24,
      "bbox": [
        261.73,
        402.03,
        514.98,
        415.07
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 10.0,
      "suggested_font": "Helvetica-Bold"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p5_b5",
      "block_type": "label",
      "source_text": "保障，讓他們冒著生命危險執行抗疫工作時能減輕一份",
      "current_translation": "to ease their concerns as they risked their lives in the fight against the pandemic.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.655,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 24,
      "bbox": [
        261.73,
        420.03,
        514.98,
        433.07
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 10.0,
      "suggested_font": "Helvetica-Bold"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p5_b6",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "憂慮。我們為超過2,500萬份保單提供免費的2019冠狀病毒",
      "current_translation": "We provided complimentary COVID-19 related coverage to over 25 million policies",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.624,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 30,
      "bbox": [
        261.73,
        438.03,
        514.85,
        451.07
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 10.0,
      "suggested_font": "Helvetica-Bold"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p5_b8",
      "block_type": "label",
      "source_text": "援。年內，我們已支付逾160億美元的保險給付和理賠，",
      "current_translation": "During the year, we paid out over USD 16 billion in insurance benefits and claims,",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.628,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 26,
      "bbox": [
        261.73,
        474.03,
        514.97,
        487.07
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 10.0,
      "suggested_font": "Helvetica-Bold"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p5_b9",
      "block_type": "label",
      "source_text": "提供必不可少的的財務支援。儘管疫情大流行的影響依",
      "current_translation": "providing essential financial support. Although the impact of the pandemic continues,",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.594,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 24,
      "bbox": [
        261.73,
        492.03,
        514.98,
        505.07
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 10.0,
      "suggested_font": "Helvetica-Bold"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p5_b10",
      "block_type": "label",
      "source_text": "然沒有結束，我們將繼續擔當支援的角色使我們的社區",
      "current_translation": "we will continue to play a supportive role in helping our communities",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.746,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 24,
      "bbox": [
        261.73,
        510.03,
        514.98,
        523.07
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 10.0,
      "suggested_font": "Helvetica-Bold"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p5_b11",
      "block_type": "label",
      "source_text": "重拾活力。",
      "current_translation": "recover and thrive.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.57,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 5,
      "bbox": [
        261.73,
        528.03,
        312.73,
        541.07
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 10.0,
      "suggested_font": "Helvetica-Bold"
    }
  ]
}
